name: DRAGON QUEST® XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age™ - Definitive Edition
short_description: The Definitive Edition includes the critically acclaimed DRAGON QUEST XI, plus additional scenarios, orchestral soundtrack, 2D mode and more! Whether you are a longtime fan or a new adventurer, this is the ultimate DQXI experience.
supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
